input.oldString:
<Input
                      type="number"
                      value={slippage}
                      onChange={(e) => setSlippage(e.target.value)}
                      className="h-9 text-xs"
                      step="0.1"
                    />
input.newString:
<Input
                      type="number"
                      value={slippage}
                      onChange={(e) => {
                        const value = sanitizeInput(e.target.value)
                        if (!value || validateSlippage(value)) {
                          setSlippage(value)
                        }
                      }}
                      className="h-9 text-xs"
                      step="0.1"
                      max="50"
                    />
